ddls:
CREATE TABLE "schengen_states" (
  "state_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each Schengen state */,
  "state_name" TEXT /* Name of the Schengen state */,
  "code" TEXT /* Two-letter code for the Schengen state */,
  "capital" TEXT /* Capital city of the Schengen state */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Population of the Schengen state */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("state_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "consulates" (
  "consulate_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each consulate */,
  "consulate_name" TEXT /* Name of the consulate */,
  "state_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the Schengen state the consulate belongs to */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country where the consulate is located */,
  "city" TEXT /* City where the consulate is located */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the consulate */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the consulate */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the consulate */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("consulate_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_consulates_state_id FOREIGN KEY ("state_id") REFERENCES schengen_states ("state_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "visa_types" (
  "visa_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each visa type */,
  "visa_type_name" TEXT /* Name of the visa type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the visa type */,
  "duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the visa in days */,
  "fee" TEXT /* Application fee for the visa */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("visa_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "visa_applications" (
  "application_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each visa application */,
  "consulate_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the consulate where the application was submitted */,
  "state_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the Schengen state the application was submitted for */,
  "visa_type_id" INTEGER /* Type of visa applied for */,
  "application_date" TEXT /* Date the application was submitted */,
  "applicant_name" TEXT /* Name of the visa applicant */,
  "applicant_dob" TEXT /* Date of birth of the visa applicant */,
  "applicant_nationality" TEXT /* Nationality of the visa applicant */,
  "applicant_passport_number" TEXT /* Passport number of the visa applicant */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("application_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_visa_applications_visa_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("visa_type_id") REFERENCES visa_types ("visa_type_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_visa_applications_consulate_id FOREIGN KEY ("consulate_id") REFERENCES consulates ("consulate_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_visa_applications_state_id FOREIGN KEY ("state_id") REFERENCES schengen_states ("state_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "visa_issuances" (
  "issuance_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each visa issuance */,
  "application_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the visa application the issuance is for */,
  "issuance_date" TEXT /* Date the visa was issued */,
  "visa_type_id" INTEGER /* Type of visa issued */,
  "multiple_issuance" INTEGER /* Indicator for multiple issuances */,
  "visa_number" TEXT /* Number of the issued visa */,
  "valid_from" TEXT /* Start date of the visa validity period */,
  "valid_until" TEXT /* End date of the visa validity period */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("issuance_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_visa_issuances_visa_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("visa_type_id") REFERENCES visa_types ("visa_type_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_visa_issuances_application_id FOREIGN KEY ("application_id") REFERENCES visa_applications ("application_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "visa_denials" (
  "denial_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each visa denial */,
  "application_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the visa application the denial is for */,
  "denial_date" TEXT /* Date the visa was denied */,
  "denial_reason" TEXT /* Reason for the denial */,
  "denial_comment" TEXT /* Additional comment on the denial */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("denial_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_visa_denials_application_id FOREIGN KEY ("application_id") REFERENCES visa_applications ("application_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., analyst, administrator) */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_audit" (
  "audit_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each audit entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user who performed the action */,
  "action" TEXT /* Type of action performed (e.g., create, update, delete) */,
  "action_date" TEXT /* Date and time the action was performed */,
  "object_type" TEXT /* Type of object the action was performed on (e.g., visa application, issuance) */,
  "object_id" INTEGER /* Identifier of the object the action was performed on */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("audit_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_audit_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "statistics" (
  "statistic_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each statistic entry */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date the statistic is for */,
  "state_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the Schengen state the statistic is for */,
  "visa_type_id" INTEGER /* Type of visa the statistic is for */,
  "applications" INTEGER /* Number of applications received on the given date */,
  "issuances" INTEGER /* Number of visas issued on the given date */,
  "denials" INTEGER /* Number of visas denied on the given date */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("statistic_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_statistics_state_id FOREIGN KEY ("state_id") REFERENCES schengen_states ("state_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_statistics_visa_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("visa_type_id") REFERENCES visa_types ("visa_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "visa_application_documents" (
  "document_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each document */,
  "application_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the visa application the document is attached to */,
  "document_type" TEXT /* Type of document (e.g., passport, ID card) */,
  "file_name" TEXT /* Name of the document file */,
  "file_content" TEXT /* Content of the document file */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("document_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_visa_application_documents_application_id FOREIGN KEY ("application_id") REFERENCES visa_applications ("application_id")
)
